security.csp: default-src 'self' blob: data:; connect-src 'self' blob: ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' blob: data:; media-src 'self' blob: data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:; child-src 'self' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Offline project workflow and out-of-office reporting
bundle.longDescription: Local-only project workflow tracking with offline spreadsheet import, photo scanning, OCR, automatic saving, and restoration.
